title: stylidium repens
intro: Stylidium repens, also known as Creeping Trigger Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are said to aid in wound healing and fighting off infections. The health benefits of Stylidium repens include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used topically as a salve or oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
